ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "subtitle" TEXT /* Subtitle of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the book belongs to */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the book */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the book */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "preview_link" TEXT /* Link to preview the book */,
  "published_status" TEXT /* Status of the book's publication (e.g., 'Published', 'Draft', 'Pending Review') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author, if applicable */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-author relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the book (e.g., 'Main Author', 'Contributor') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the publisher was established */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the publisher */,
  "publisher_type" TEXT /* Type of publisher (e.g., 'Traditional', 'Self-Publishing', 'Academic') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "num_books" INTEGER /* Number of books in the series */,
  "series_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the series */,
  "series_status" TEXT /* Status of the series (e.g., 'Ongoing', 'Completed', 'Abandoned') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of format (e.g., 'Physical', 'Digital') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Native name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., 'Verified Purchase', 'ARC', 'Advance Review') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, reviewer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per book */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., 'Online', 'Offline', 'Subscription') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the location opened */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., 'Store', 'Warehouse', 'Event') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite book entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the book to their favorites */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book added to the user's favorites */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the book was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book version */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the book */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_versions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_tags" (
  "book_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-tag relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_tags_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_awards" (
  "book_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-award relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award */,
  "year_received" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)
